name: Chainalysis
description: Chainalysis — Blockchain data platform for tracing cryptocurrency transactions and compliance investigations.

seo.title: Chainalysis — Product Analytics
seo.meta_description: Chainalysis: Chainalysis — Blockchain data platform for tracing cryptocurrency transactions and compliance investigations.

when_to_use: KYC/AML compliance screening of crypto wallet addresses
Sanctions screening for crypto exchange compliance
Transaction tracing for law enforcement investigations
Risk scoring API for crypto payment processors
Real-time fraud detection for DeFi protocol

pros: Industry standard for crypto compliance and investigations
Coverage across major chains and bridges
Trusted by regulators, exchanges, and law enforcement
Rich graph exploration and attribution data
cons: Not a product analytics tool despite taxonomy
Attribution labels can be outdated or disputed
review.verdict: Category-defining blockchain intelligence platform; essential for crypto compliance, irrelevant for most product teams.
review.best_for: Exchanges, banks, and agencies doing AML, sanctions, and blockchain investigations.
review.not_for: Product analytics, web2 SaaS, or anyone without regulatory or crypto forensics needs.
